title: Offline product catalog with local caching
description: Cache product catalog locally so users can browse products offline. Use expo-sqlite or AsyncStorage for structured product data, expo-file-system for image caching. Strategy: (1) Fetch full catalog on first load, (2) Incremental sync on subsequent opens, (3) Stale-while-revalidate for images, (4) Clear visual indicator when offline (banner), (5) Graceful degradation — browsing works, cart/checkout shows offline message. Acceptance criteria: (1) Products load from cache when no network, (2) Images cached for last 50 viewed products, (3) Offline banner appears within 2s of connectivity loss, (4) Cache invalidation on app update, (5) Storage usage under 50MB. Scout: investigate whether react-query/tanstack-query persistence plugin is simpler than rolling our own. Flag tradeoffs.

title: User authentication: sign-up, login, password reset
description: Implement user auth flow with email/password and social login (Google, Apple). Includes sign-up screen, login screen, forgot password, session persistence with SecureStore. Use Expo AuthSession for OAuth. Design screens using existing theme tokens. Include form validation, error states, loading states. Acceptance criteria: (1) User can sign up with email/password, (2) User can login, (3) Session persists across app restarts, (4) Apple Sign In on iOS, Google Sign In on both platforms, (5) Forgot password sends reset email, (6) All screens use theme tokens and pass accessibility audit. Scout: feel free to propose alternative auth approaches (e.g. magic link, phone OTP) and flag any security concerns.

title: Wishlist and saved products
description:
Build wishlist/favorites feature with heart button on product cards, dedicated wishlist screen, and share capability.

AC:
1. Heart/bookmark button on all product cards and product detail screen
2. Wishlist screen shows saved products in grid layout
3. Remove from wishlist via swipe or long-press
4. Share wishlist: generate shareable link with selected products
5. Wishlist persists across sessions (synced to Wix member data)
6. Badge on wishlist tab icon shows saved item count
7. Price change indicator: show if saved product price dropped
8. Edge case: empty wishlist shows illustration + 'Browse products' CTA

title: Product detail: gallery, options, add-to-cart
description: Image gallery, fabric selector, dimensions, add-to-cart CTA.

title: Deep linking from emails, SMS, and social media
description:
Implement universal deep links so marketing emails, SMS, and social posts can link directly to products, categories, and cart in the app.

AC:
1. URL scheme: carolinafutons://product/{slug}, carolinafutons://category/{slug}, carolinafutons://cart
2. Universal links: https://carolinafutons.com/product/{slug} opens app if installed
3. Deferred deep links: if app not installed, redirect to App Store then deep link on first open
4. UTM parameter tracking: capture source/medium/campaign for attribution
5. Email links: product links in transactional emails open in app
6. Social share: shared products include deep link URL
7. Deep link handling: graceful fallback to home screen if target not found
8. Edge case: expired promo code in deep link shows 'This offer has ended' message

title: Analytics and crash reporting integration
description:
Integrate Firebase Analytics + Sentry crash reporting for production visibility. Track screen views, product interactions, cart events, and crashes.

AC:
1. Firebase Analytics tracks: screen_view, view_product, add_to_cart, begin_checkout, purchase
2. User properties set: account status, app version, platform
3. Sentry crash reporting captures unhandled exceptions with device context
4. GDPR consent: analytics only enabled after user accepts privacy prompt
5. Debug mode: analytics events logged to console in development
6. Performance monitoring: screen load times, API call durations
7. Monthly automated report: top screens, conversion funnel, crash-free rate
8. Edge case: analytics failure does not crash app (silent fallback)

title: Shopping cart and checkout with BNPL
description: Cart, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Affirm/Klarna BNPL.

title: Order history and shipment tracking
description:
Build order history screen showing past orders with status, tracking info, and reorder capability. Integrates with Wix Stores order API.

AC:
1. Order history screen shows list of past orders (date, total, status, item count)
2. Order detail view: line items with thumbnails, prices, quantities
3. Tracking status: processing, shipped, in-transit, delivered with timeline
4. Tracking number tap opens carrier tracking page in browser
5. Reorder button adds all items from past order to current cart
6. Pull-to-refresh updates order list
7. Edge case: no orders shows 'No orders yet — start shopping' with CTA
8. Edge case: cancelled orders show 'Cancelled' status with reason
close_reason: Duplicate of cm-pvh (already assigned to scout)

title: Push notifications for orders and promotions
description:
Integrate Expo push notifications for order status updates, sale alerts, abandoned cart reminders, and new product launches.

AC:
1. Push notification permission request on first app launch (with value proposition)
2. Order status notifications: shipped, out for delivery, delivered
3. Sale/promotion notifications for products in wishlist
4. Abandoned cart reminder: 1 hour after adding to cart without checkout
5. Notification settings screen: toggle categories (orders, sales, new products)
6. Notification tap deep-links to relevant screen (order detail, product, cart)
7. Badge count on app icon reflects unread notifications
8. Edge case: permission denied shows banner explaining benefits with settings link
close_reason: Duplicate of cm-jbo (already assigned to scout)

title: Push notifications: order updates, promotions, back-in-stock
description: Implement push notification system using expo-notifications. Register for push tokens, store server-side, handle foreground/background/killed states. Notification types: (1) Order status updates (confirmed, shipped, delivered), (2) Promotional campaigns, (3) Back-in-stock alerts for wishlisted items, (4) Abandoned cart reminders. Acceptance criteria: (1) Permission request with clear value prop, (2) Token registration with backend, (3) Deep linking from notification tap to relevant screen, (4) Notification preferences screen (toggle per type), (5) Badge count management. Scout: research whether expo-notifications alone suffices or if we need a service like OneSignal/FCM directly. Propose the simplest approach that scales.

title: Order history and order tracking screen
description: Build order history screen accessible from Account tab. Shows past orders with status, items, totals. Tap into order detail with tracking info. Needs: (1) Order list with status badges (Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled), (2) Order detail screen showing line items, shipping address, payment method (masked), tracking number with carrier link, (3) Re-order button that adds items back to cart, (4) Pull-to-refresh, (5) Empty state for new users. Acceptance criteria: (1) Orders sorted newest-first, (2) Status badge colors match theme tokens, (3) Tracking number opens carrier website, (4) Re-order handles out-of-stock gracefully, (5) Works with mock data initially, API integration later. Scout: propose the data model for orders and suggest how to handle real-time status updates (polling vs websocket vs push).

title: Product browsing: list, search, filter, sort
description: Product list screen with category filters, price sort, search bar, infinite scroll. Wix CMS API.

title: User authentication and account management
description:
Build login/signup flow with email/password auth, social login (Google/Apple), password reset, and profile editing. Auth state persists via SecureStore.

AC:
1. Login screen with email + password fields and validation
2. Sign up screen with name, email, password, confirm password
3. Social login: Google Sign-In and Apple Sign-In buttons
4. Password reset via email verification flow
5. Auth token stored in SecureStore (not AsyncStorage)
6. Profile screen: view/edit name, email, shipping address
7. Auth state persists across app restarts
8. Protected routes: cart, orders, wishlist require login (redirect to auth)
close_reason: Duplicate of cm-7ql (already assigned to scout)
